message:
fix(gateway): code review fixes and enhancements

- Fix logger inconsistency in agent-state-machine emitStateChange
  (use getLogger() for correlation context instead of direct import)
- Fix interrupt endpoint to propagate ZodError validation errors
  instead of silently falling back to default signal
- Remove unused LifecycleState import from agents.ts
- Add explicit type annotation for agentDetails variable
- Add refreshAgentRecord for agent state synchronization
- Add createdAfter/createdBefore date filters for list endpoint
- Add types filter for output endpoint
- Improve toWebSocketUrl to properly handle https→wss
- Add database persistence for spawned agents

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
